pysnap.vbox package¶

VirtualBox integration package for PySnap.

Submodules¶

pysnap.vbox.client module¶

VirtualBox client abstraction built on top of VBoxManage.

class pysnap.vbox.client.RunnerProtocol(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Describe the command runner used by the client.

run(arguments)[source]¶

Execute a command and return its standard output.

Parameters:

arguments (Sequence[str]) – Arguments passed to VBoxManage.

Returns:

Standard output.

Return type:

str

run_streaming(arguments, output_callback)[source]¶

Execute a command and stream textual output chunks.

Parameters:

  • arguments (Sequence[str]) – Arguments passed to VBoxManage.

  • output_callback (Callable[[str], None]) – Callback for output chunks.

Returns:

Combined command output.

Return type:

str

class pysnap.vbox.client.SubprocessRunner(executable=None)[source]¶

Bases: RunnerProtocol

Run VBoxManage commands using subprocess.

Parameters:

executable (str | None)

MACOS_APP_BUNDLE_EXECUTABLE = PosixPath('/Applications/VirtualBox.app/Contents/MacOS/VBoxManage')¶
run(arguments)[source]¶

Execute VBoxManage and return standard output.

Parameters:

arguments (Sequence[str]) – Arguments passed to VBoxManage.

Returns:

Standard output text.

Raises:

CommandExecutionError – If the command exits unsuccessfully.

Return type:

str

run_streaming(arguments, output_callback)[source]¶

Execute VBoxManage and stream merged output chunks.

Parameters:

  • arguments (Sequence[str]) – Arguments passed to VBoxManage.

  • output_callback (Callable[[str], None]) – Callback for output chunks.

Returns:

Combined command output.

Raises:

CommandExecutionError – If the command exits unsuccessfully.

Return type:

str

class pysnap.vbox.client.VBoxManageClient(runner=None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Expose the subset of VirtualBox operations required by PySnap.

Parameters:

runner (RunnerProtocol | None)

IMPORT_PROGRESS_PATTERN = re.compile('(?P<percent>\\d{1,3})%')¶
DMI_SYSTEM_VENDOR_KEY = 'VBoxInternal/Devices/pcbios/0/Config/DmiSystemVendor'¶
DMI_SYSTEM_SKU_KEY = 'VBoxInternal/Devices/pcbios/0/Config/DmiSystemSKU'¶
list_vms()[source]¶

List all registered VMs.

Returns:

Parsed VM references.

Return type:

list[VMReference]

get_vm_info(vm_name)[source]¶

Read detailed information about a VM.

Parameters:

vm_name (str) – VM name to inspect.

Returns:

Detailed VM information.

Return type:

VMInfo

dry_run_import(image_path)[source]¶

Run an appliance import dry run.

Parameters:

image_path (str) – Appliance path.

Returns:

Import candidates discovered by VirtualBox.

Return type:

list[ImportCandidate]

import_appliance(image_path, candidates, progress_callback=None)[source]¶

Import an appliance using the supplied dry-run candidates.

Parameters:

  • image_path (str) – Appliance path.

  • candidates (list[ImportCandidate]) – Normalized import candidates.

  • progress_callback (Callable[[int], None] | None) – Optional import progress callback.

Return type:

None

get_current_snapshot_name(vm_name)[source]¶

Return a snapshot name suitable for linked cloning.

Parameters:

vm_name (str) – VM name to inspect.

Returns:

Snapshot name, if any.

Return type:

str | None

take_snapshot(vm_name, snapshot_name)[source]¶

Create a snapshot for a VM.

Parameters:

  • vm_name (str) – VM name.

  • snapshot_name (str) – Snapshot name to create.

Return type:

None

clone_linked(base_vm, clone_vm, group, snapshot_name)[source]¶

Create and register a linked clone.

Parameters:

  • base_vm (str) – Source VM name.

  • clone_vm (str) – Clone VM name.

  • group (str) – Group assigned to the clone.

  • snapshot_name (str) – Snapshot used as clone source.

Return type:

None

start_vm_headless(vm_name)[source]¶

Start a VM in headless mode.

Parameters:

vm_name (str) – VM name.

Return type:

None

stop_vm_acpi(vm_name)[source]¶

Request a graceful ACPI shutdown for a running VM.

Parameters:

vm_name (str) – VM name.

Return type:

None

get_vm_state(vm_name)[source]¶

Return the current VirtualBox runtime state of a VM.

Parameters:

vm_name (str) – VM name.

Returns:

Raw VirtualBox state string.

Return type:

str

configure_serial_port(vm_name, serial_port)[source]¶

Configure UART1 as a TCP server on the provided host port.

Parameters:

  • vm_name (str) – VM name.

  • serial_port (int) – Host TCP port exposed through UART1.

Raises:

PySnapError – If the port number is unsupported.

Return type:

None

configure_internal_networks(vm_name, networks)[source]¶

Configure up to three internal network adapters.

Parameters:

  • vm_name (str) – VM name.

  • networks (Sequence[str]) – Internal network names.

Raises:

PySnapError – If more than three networks are provided.

Return type:

None

set_metadata(vm_name, metadata)[source]¶

Persist PySnap metadata in VirtualBox extra data.

Parameters:

  • vm_name (str) – VM name.

  • metadata (dict[str, str]) – Extra data entries to set.

Return type:

None

configure_dmi_system_information(vm_name, system_vendor, system_sku)[source]¶

Persist DMI system information for one VM.

Parameters:

  • vm_name (str) – VM name.

  • system_vendor (str) – DMI system vendor value.

  • system_sku (str) – DMI system SKU value.

Return type:

None

get_metadata(vm_name)[source]¶

Read all extra data entries for a VM.

Parameters:

vm_name (str) – VM name.

Returns:

Extra data mapping.

Return type:

dict[str, str]

delete_vm(vm_name)[source]¶

Delete and unregister a VM.

Parameters:

vm_name (str) – VM name.

Return type:

None

pysnap.vbox.parsers module¶

Parsers for VBoxManage command output.

pysnap.vbox.parsers.parse_list_vms(output)[source]¶

Parse VBoxManage list vms output.

Parameters:

output (str) – Raw command output.

Returns:

Parsed VM references.

Return type:

list[VMReference]

pysnap.vbox.parsers.parse_machine_readable(output)[source]¶

Parse VBoxManage --machinereadable output.

Parameters:

output (str) – Raw command output.

Returns:

Mapping of property names to values.

Return type:

dict[str, str]

pysnap.vbox.parsers.parse_extra_data(output)[source]¶

Parse VBoxManage getextradata ... enumerate output.

Parameters:

output (str) – Raw command output.

Returns:

Mapping of extra data keys to values.

Return type:

dict[str, str]

pysnap.vbox.parsers.parse_snapshot_names(properties)[source]¶

Extract snapshot names from machine-readable VM properties.

Parameters:

properties (dict[str, str]) – Parsed machine-readable VM properties.

Returns:

Snapshot names ordered with the current snapshot first when possible.

Return type:

list[str]

pysnap.vbox.parsers.parse_import_candidates(output)[source]¶

Parse VBoxManage import --dry-run output.

Parameters:

output (str) – Raw dry-run output.

Returns:

Appliance VM candidates discovered in the dry run.

Return type:

list[ImportCandidate]

pysnap.vbox.parsers.split_groups(raw_groups)[source]¶

Split a machine-readable group list.

Parameters:

raw_groups (str) – Raw groups property value.

Returns:

Tuple of group names.

Return type:

tuple[str, …]
